text: As shown in Figure 2B, we first constructed Prdx1 flox mouse (Prdx1flox) based on C57BL/6J background and crossed them with acinar-specific Cre tool mice (ptf1α-Cre) to obtain acinar cell conditional knockout Prdx1 mice (pancreatic Prdx1 ko, PcKO mouse). Southern blot analysis identified the PcKO mice at the DNA level. Subsequently, immunofluorescence (IF) co-staining of Prdx1 and the acinar cell marker protein amylase confirmed the successful construction of PcKO mice (Fig 2C and 2D).
heading_context: 3.1 Intracellular Prdx1 deficiency in acinar cells exacerbates SAP by inducing cell apoptosis and ferroptosis
